steps.t: Dolguzîr can be found somewhere on the north-most ship at Edhellond. Dolvir has asked you to defeat Dolguzîr in hopes that it will shatter the leaders…
Dolvir can be found on a hilltop to the east of Edhellond. You have defeated the Corsair captain, Dolguzîr, and broken the leadership of the Corsairs …
Gilanor can be found in Ost Lontir in central Belfalas. You have slain the Corsair leader in Edhellond and aided Dolvir. You should now return to Gila…
